COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; BAILIFF: JAMIE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RCE)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Sherry Jackman, Esq. of Greenberg Glusker Fields Claman Machtinger LLP, Tel. 310.553.3610, for Defendant ADFA, Inc.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter called, no argument is held. Ms. Jackman states that she is appearing to make sure that the tentative ruling is adopted and to answer any questions for the Court. No questions by the Court.

At the conclusion of Ms. Jackman's comments, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order and judgment.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Bailiff: Jamie; Not Reported. (302/RCE)
